description_long: This is a large, freestanding wooden awning structure with a pitched roof covered in reddish-brown tiles. The front features two wide open bays supported by sturdy wooden posts and beams, allowing vehicles or people to pass underneath. The side and rear walls are constructed from horizontal wooden planks, with the rear wall fully enclosed and one side featuring a single vertical brown door. The roof is composed of regularly patterned, overlapping tiles, providing both weather protection and a visually appealing finish. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for use as a carport, shelter, or covered gathering space in an urban or residential setting.
description: A large, freestanding wooden awning with a pitched, tiled roof and open front bays, supported by posts and beams. The structure features enclosed wooden sides and a single side door.
description_view_0: Front view showing two wide open bays supported by wooden posts and beams, with the pitched tiled roof and horizontal plank facade.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the tiled roof and the horizontal wooden plank wall, with no visible openings.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a fully enclosed wooden plank wall beneath the pitched roof, with no openings or doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the tiled roof, horizontal plank wall, and a single vertical brown door near one end.
attribute_canopy_pattern: regularly patterned, overlapping reddish-brown roof tiles
attribute_edge_trim_style: straight edge with no decorative trim
attribute_support_structure_type: fixed frame with posts and beams
